title: viola sandbergii
intro: Viola sandbergii, also known as Sandberg's violet, is a perennial plant species belonging to the viola genus. It is native to the northwestern regions of North America, particularly in British Columbia and Washington state. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Viola sandbergii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and support the immune system, with herbal preparations often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions.
